Writing Speaking How I help About Search LinkedIn
How I can help

Bring me the question your team keeps circling around.

I work with teams and individuals where technology, attention, and personal development meet. Rather than selling a fixed catalogue, I shape a talk, workshop, or conversation around the change you want to create.

Areas we can explore

Different entry points, one common thread: helping people work with more intention.

01

Mindful engineering

Better focus, clearer choices, healthier pace.

Explore context switching, cognitive load, craftsmanship, flow, and how engineering teams can create space for deep and meaningful work.

02

AI integration

Adopt AI without becoming a passenger.

Find a deliberate balance between acceleration and understanding, with attention to ownership, guardrails, mastery, and the human side of adoption.

03

Personal leadership

Lead from awareness rather than perfection.

Work with the inner critic, communicate intention, navigate discomfort, and build the confidence to show up before everything feels polished.

Existing session

Working Like a Buddha

A practical session about attention and flow in busy organizations. It translates Zen principles into the ordinary working day without incense, mysticism, or pretending that Slack does not exist.

  • Recognize when busyness turns into mental thrashing
  • Experiment with focus, slowing down, and single-tasking
  • Leave with practices that can survive a real workweek
Start with your context

Not sure whether you need a talk, workshop, or facilitated conversation?

Share what is happening in your team, what feels stuck, or what you want people to see differently. From there, we can discover a useful format together.

Start on LinkedIn
The digital zen garden

Build with clarity. Lead with care.

Software engineer, coach, speaker, and Zen teacher exploring how technology, leadership, and attention can help people build with more clarity, trust, and care.
